Justin Sun ridicules Germany’s Bitcoin sell-off after UEFA Euro knockout
articles.description: Justin Sun, the founder of the Tron blockchain, made fun of Germany and its massive BTC sell-off. Justin suggested that Germany lost in the UEFA Euro 2024 Cup quarter-finals because she ‘sold too much Bitcoin.’ Other X users and BTC enthusiasts added to the tweet, with some X users suggesting that Germany should have HODLed.
